headline: Prologis forms $1.6B JV to develop logistics facilities
summary: Logistics REIT Prologis announced Thursday a new $1.6 billion joint venture to develop build-to-suit facilities in the U.S. The post Prologis forms $1.6B JV to develop logistics facilities appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Anori, Alphabet’s new X spinout, is tackling one of the world’s most expensive bureaucratic nightmares
summary: Anori aims to shrink down the pre-development process by getting all parties, including the city, on to a unified platform from the start so that compliance conflicts are surfaced in weeks instead of months or years.

headline: Prologis and GIC Form $1.6 billion U.S. Build-to-Suit Logistics Joint Venture
summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) and GIC, a leading global institutional investor, have formed a $1.6 billion joint venture to develop and own build-to-suit logistics facilities across major U.S. markets, the companies announced today.
